---
title: pelican cache introspect verify
---

## pelican cache introspect verify

Verify checksum of a cached object

### Synopsis

Trigger checksum verification for a cached object.

This reads the entire object from disk, decrypts it, and verifies
that stored checksums (if any) match the actual data.

Example:
  pelican cache introspect verify pelican://my-federation/data/file.dat
  pelican cache introspect verify /data/file.dat --etag="abc123"

```
pelican cache introspect verify <object-url> [flags]
```

### Options

```
      --etag string       Specify ETag of the version to verify
  -h, --help              help for verify
      --instance string   Specify instance hash directly
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --cache-dir string    Override cache directory (default: from config)
      --config string       config file (default is $HOME/.config/pelican/pelican.yaml)
  -d, --debug               Enable debug log messages
  -f, --federation string   Pelican federation to utilize
      --json                Output in JSON format
  -L, --log string          Specified log output file
      --offline             Force offline mode (direct database access). By default, if the cache is running, queries go to the live service.
  -t, --token string        Path to admin token file (online mode only; auto-generated if not provided)
      --version             Print the version and exit
```
